summary: Verified NXT8 backend test-suite stabilization: all 6 converted deterministic tests in test_p0_unification.py pass consistently (3/3 runs, ~1.25s each). Tests no longer depend on live network/LLM behavior.

minor.issue: 3 other tests in test_p0_unification.py fail due to missing seeded data (test_roi_current_by_agent_cost_covers_channels, test_documents_list_and_get, test_mempalace_search_finds_uploaded_document) - these are live integration tests outside the scope of this verification

critical_code_review_comments: All 6 converted tests use monkeypatch to mock internal async functions - no live HTTP/LLM calls
test_requests_lists_all_channels: mocks orchestrator_agent.list_recent_requests with fake channel data
test_voice_converse_pipeline_keys: mocks voice_agent.transcribe, hermes_coo_agent.enhanced_chat, voice_agent.synthesize, and finalize_llm_turn
test_create_followup_lands_in_tasks_collection: directly calls HERMES_TOOLS['create_followup'] without LLM - pure DB write test

success_rate.backend: 100% for converted tests (6/6 passed), 77% overall (10/13 passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: test_p0_unification.py stabilization verified. The 6 converted tests are now deterministic unit-style tests using monkeypatch. The 3 failing tests (test_roi_current_by_agent_cost_covers_channels, test_documents_list_and_get, test_mempalace_search_finds_uploaded_document) are live integration tests that require seeded data and are outside the scope of this verification.

mocked_apis_verification.determinism_test: 3 consecutive runs all passed with consistent timing (~1.25-1.27s)
